item.musketmod.musket.tooltip: 7 hearts a shot. Punches straight through walls.
item.musketmod.musket.tooltip2: Left-click to fire. Right-click to reload (5s).
item.musketmod.musket.tooltip3: Hold right-click when loaded to aim down the sights.
item.musketmod.musket.one_per_hotbar: You can only carry one musket in your hotbar or offhand!
